medialive.channel.captionselector.Langua.Description: When specified, this field indicates the three-letter language code of the captions track to extract from the source.

medialive.channel.captionselector.Name.Description: The name identifier for a captions selector. This name is used to associate this captions selector with one or more captions descriptions. Names must be unique within a channel.

medialive.channel.captionselector.Select.Description: Information about the specific audio to extract from the input.
